note: Reviewed fixable-duplication overlay (item 5). Keyed by family identity (code: nose family_id; doc: family_signature). Stores only explicitly-classified families; an unlisted family defaults to 'unreviewed'. fixable_ceiling (count of 'fixable') is one-way and only decreases via a deliberate re-review. nose-baseline.json / doc-nose-baseline.json own drift detection; this overlay owns fixable classification.
